## Broadcom General Counsel Among Executives Reporting Stock Sales in June

Routine regulatory filing with no fundamental read-through. GC stock sales do not alter the AVGO investment thesis.

- Law360 reports GC-level stock sales for June, with Broadcom named alongside Rocket Lab and others.
- Filing is routine Form 144 disclosure; no business development or strategic news is indicated.
- GC-level transactions carry lower signal than CEO or CFO insider sales.
- Low-confidence classifier tag confirms minimal fundamental content.
